title: xViewShulkers
body:
### 📦 xViewShulkers

**The ultimate Quality of Life (QoL) mod for Shulker Boxes.**

> Ever got tired of placing down Shulker Boxes just to see what's inside? `xViewShulkers` solves this by adding intuitive, seamless interactions directly to your inventory. 

> ## ✨ Features

* **🔍 Visual Tooltip (Hover):** Simply hover your mouse over any Shulker Box in your inventory to instantly see a visual 9x3 grid of its contents. No more guessing by reading boring text lists!
* **🎒 Quick Open (Shift + Right Click):** Need to grab an item quickly? Hold `Shift` and `Right-Click` on a Shulker Box in your inventory to open its interface directly. You can add, remove, and manage items without ever placing the box on the ground.

> ## ⚙️ Compatibility & Multiplayer

`xViewShulkers` is designed to be as flexible as possible:

* **Singleplayer:** Everything works perfectly right out of the box!
* **Multiplayer (Servers):** * 🖥️ **Client-Side Magic:** The **Visual Hover Tooltip** is 100% Client-Side! It will work on *any* server (vanilla, paper, minigame networks) just by having the mod installed on your client.
    * 🌐 **Server-Side Features:** The **Shift + Right Click** inventory opening feature requires the mod to be installed on *both* the Client and the Server. This is to ensure inventory manipulation is safe and synchronized.
